ai_analysis.quality_context: The Signature (DAMAC Maison Mall Street) is a high-end serviced hotel-apartment development. At 1,372 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit offers a significantly larger layout than newer Downtown Dubai handovers, which typically average 1,000 to 1,200 sqft. The property is fully furnished to hotel standards and offered vacant, allowing for immediate occupancy or rental placement. While DAMAC Maison provides premium hospitality amenities (spa, valet, concierge, pool), the build quality and aesthetic are tailored to a hospitality-focused product rather than a traditional residential tower.
risk_flags: High Service Charges: Serviced apartments under the DAMAC Maison brand carry significantly higher service charges (often 30-50% higher than standard residential towers in Downtown), which will heavily compress net rental yields.

Developer Discount: DAMAC properties in Downtown historically trade at a discount compared to Emaar-developed master communities due to secondary market preferences and historical maintenance standards.

Traffic Congestion: Located directly on Mall Street, the immediate vicinity suffers from severe traffic bottlenecks during peak hours, weekends, and Dubai Mall events, impacting resident accessibility.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: Priced at AED 1,749 per sqft, this property trades at a massive 32.4% discount to the Downtown Dubai market median of AED 2,587 per sqft. This low entry point offers strong downside protection and capital appreciation potential. Given its 'Vacant Now' status, turnkey furnished condition, and immediate proximity to Dubai Mall, the optimal investment strategy is short-term holiday home rentals, which can absorb the high service charges and generate double-digit gross yields. It represents an undervalued asset for cash-flow-focused investors willing to manage serviced-apartment operational costs.

title: HOT DEAL! / Exclusive Unit / Vacant Soon
description:

• Arabian Style Corner Villa

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Jumeirah Village Triangle (JVT), a mature, family-centric freehold community developed by Nakheel. This property is an independent, Arabian-style corner villa. JVT villas are highly sought after due to their exceptionally large plot sizes, which offer superior privacy and significant potential for capital appreciation through expansion. The 'Vacant Soon' status is a strong selling point in Dubai's current high-demand market, appealing to end-users looking to move in quickly or investors aiming to capitalize on current market-rate rents.
risk_flags: Pricing/Sqft Discrepancy: The listed 7,342 sqft represents the plot size, not the Built-Up Area (BUA), which is typically around 2,700 sqft for this villa type. Comparing the AED 756/sqft price (calculated on plot size) to the market median of AED 1,497/sqft (calculated on BUA) is highly misleading. On a BUA basis, the price is actually ~AED 2,055/sqft, which is a premium to the market.

Tenant Eviction Timeline: 'Vacant soon' requires strict legal verification. Under Dubai tenancy law, a landlord must serve a 12-month notarized eviction notice. If this has not been officially served, the buyer may face delays in taking possession.

Capital Expenditure (CAPEX): JVT villas of this vintage (built circa 2012) often require significant modernization, renovation, or MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) upgrades, which must be factored into the acquisition cost.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At an implied valuation of ~AED 5.55M, this property should be analyzed as a 'value-add' redevelopment play rather than a turnkey yield asset. The massive 7,342 sqft corner plot is the primary value driver, offering an investor the opportunity to expand the BUA (e.g., adding bedrooms or upgrading the layout) to flip for a premium. As a standard 2-bedroom rental, the net yield will be compressed due to the high entry price. Acquisition is recommended primarily for investors with the capital and appetite for renovation and expansion.

risk_flags: Building Age & Maintenance: Completed in 2009, the building may face higher wear-and-tear, potentially leading to rising maintenance costs or future special levies for capital improvements.
Lower Capital Appreciation Potential: Mid-to-low tier buildings in Dubai Marina historically experience slower capital growth compared to premium, modern waterfront developments.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: The unit is currently tenanted at AED 80,000. Increasing the rent to current market rates will be restricted by the RERA rental index, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Secondary Location: Situated at the far end of Dubai Marina, which, while highly accessible, is generally considered less premium than the central Marina or Marina Phase 1 areas.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents an exceptional high-yield, entry-level investment opportunity in Dubai Marina. With a net ROI of 6.75% (well above the Marina average of 5-5.5%) and a low service charge of AED 11/sqft, it is highly optimized for cash flow. The significant discount to the market median price per sqft provides a strong safety margin. It is highly recommended for yield-focused investors seeking stable, immediate rental income rather than aggressive capital appreciation.

This unit stands out as one of the best-priced properties currently available in the building, making it a rare find for investors seeking immediate returns and long-term value appreciation.

The property is tenanted, ensuring instant rental income from day one, and offers a strong ROI, making it an ideal addition to any investment portfolio.

What truly sets this unit apart is the inclusion of two dedicated parking spaces — a highly sought-after feature in Dubai Marina that significantly enhances both rental demand and resale value.

Property Features:

* Tenanted unit – immediate income
* The lowest-priced units in the market
* Two allocated parking spaces
* Spacious layout with excellent potential
* Located in a prime marina community

Residents of Marina Heights enjoy access to a range of amenities.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Marina Heights is an established, mid-tier residential tower completed in 2006, located in the high-demand northern district of Dubai Marina. At 1,287 sqft, this 2-bedroom unit offers a highly generous layout compared to modern, more compact layouts. Priced at AED 1,546 per sqft, the property sits at a massive ~32% discount to the Dubai Marina market median of AED 2,278 per sqft. This pricing gap is primarily driven by the building's age and older aesthetic, but it represents an excellent entry point for value-seeking investors. The inclusion of two allocated parking spaces is a highly lucrative differentiator, as most 2-bedroom units in this micro-market only allocate one.
risk_flags: Building Age & CapEx: Completed in 2006, the building may require higher maintenance fees, and the unit itself may need significant capital expenditure (renovation) to command premium market rents.

RERA Rental Cap Limitations: Being sold 'tenanted' guarantees immediate cash flow, but the current rent is likely locked below current market rates due to RERA rental index restrictions, limiting immediate yield optimization.
Slower Capital Appreciation: Older towers in Dubai Marina typically experience slower capital growth compared to newer, premium waterfront developments in the same area.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property is a classic 'value-add' defensive play. The steep 32% discount to the market median provides a strong safety margin and downside protection. While the building's age limits rapid capital appreciation, the combination of immediate rental income, a spacious layout, and the rare asset of two parking spaces ensures high rental liquidity and strong net yields. This is a highly recommended buy for income-focused investors looking to secure stable, above-average ROI in a prime, high-occupancy location, with the long-term option to renovate and flip for capital gains upon tenant exit.

To explore our complete portfolio of properties, including exclusive off-market opportunities, get in touch with our expert specialists. Discover your ideal home or investment on the Betterhomes website, where a thoughtfully curated selection awaits.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Situated in the world-renowned Palm Jumeirah, this 1-bedroom apartment offers an exceptionally spacious footprint of 1,143 sqft, far exceeding the typical 750-900 sqft average for 1-beds in Dubai. The property's premium positioning on a high floor, combined with private beach access and upgraded interiors, places it in a highly desirable tier for luxury tenants and holidaymakers. Its vacant status provides immediate operational flexibility for rental generation or personal use.
risk_flags: Extreme Underpricing: The asking price of AED 2,796/sqft is ~41% below the Palm Jumeirah median of AED 4,727/sqft, which is a major red flag for potential bait-and-switch advertising or undisclosed property defects.

Development Age & Quality: The pricing suggests this is likely located in an older Palm development (e.g., Shoreline or Golden Mile) where service charges can be high and infrastructure may require maintenance, unlike the newer ultra-luxury projects driving the median price up.
Upgrade Approvals: Risk of unauthorized renovations. Buyers must verify if the 'upgraded' status is backed by official Developer (Nakheel) and Dubai Municipality NOCs.
Outstanding Liabilities: Beachfront properties often carry high service fees; any outstanding seller liabilities must be cleared prior to transfer.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents a high-upside, value-add opportunity on paper, trading at a massive discount to the Palm Jumeirah market median. If the listing is genuine and passes physical and legal due diligence, it is an ideal asset for a high-yielding short-term rental (Airbnb) strategy, leveraging its private beach access and large layout to target premium tourists. Investors should proceed with caution, prioritizing verification of the title deed, building identity, and upgrade compliance.

ai_analysis.quality_context: Located in Altura 1, Waada within the rapidly expanding Dubai South district, this 401 sqft studio represents a highly competitive entry point. At AED 1,294 per sqft, the property is priced approximately 31% below the area's market median of AED 1,875 per sqft. The inclusion of a 2-year post-handover payment plan significantly enhances its appeal, offering buyers financial leverage in a high-growth zone anchored by the Al Maktoum International Airport expansion and Expo City.
risk_flags: The significant discount to the market median (AED 1,294 vs. AED 1,875) may indicate a less premium sub-developer, a less desirable unit view/floor, or an urgent liquidation by the seller.
Resale transaction complexity, requiring strict verification that the original buyer has cleared all due milestone payments with the developer before transfer.
Potential handover delays, which are common in newly developing master communities like Dubai South.
Initial rental yields may face downward pressure until surrounding infrastructure and community amenities in the Waada sub-locality are fully completed.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This resale studio is an opportunistic buy for value-driven investors. Priced well below the market median at AED 1,294/sqft and paired with a highly desirable 2-year post-handover payment plan, it offers strong potential for capital appreciation as Dubai South matures. The low absolute ticket size (approximately AED 519,000) combined with flexible payment terms makes it an excellent asset for high-leverage yield generation or mid-term capital gains, provided developer credentials and payment histories are thoroughly vetted.

Kamoon 1 is nestled within Old Town, a characterful Arabian-style enclave at the heart of Downtown Dubai. The building sits steps from Souk Al Bahar and within easy reach of the Burj Khalifa, the Dubai Fountain, Dubai Opera, and The Dubai Mall  one of the world's largest retail and dining destinations. Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard offers an outstanding array of luxury retail outlets, fine-dining restaurants, and trendy cafes, while Spinneys and Carrefour Market provide everyday convenience close by.

Downtown Dubai offers excellent connectivity via direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road (E11) and Financial Centre Road (D71), linking residents seamlessly to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is easily accessible, and the community's pedestrian-friendly streets make walking a pleasure.

This 905 square foot space is meticulously designed to maximize both comfort and style, featuring one well-appointed bathrooms and a thoughtfully arranged living area that flows effortlessly into a dedicated bedroom. Ideal for an individual or small household, the open plan invites natural light to dance across its surfaces, crafting an atmosphere that feels both inviting and airy. Despite being unfurnished, the layout ensures a perfect canvas for you to infuse with your personal style and touches. Residents here relish access to a suite of top-notch amenities, including a shared gym for maintaining wellness routines, a refreshing shared pool and spa for leisurely moments, and a dedicated children’s play area and pool for younger family members. The building is equipped with central air conditioning, a spacious lobby, secure covered parking, and a concierge service, all under vigilant security, ensuring peace of mind around the clock. Pets are also welcome, making it an ideal home for pet lovers. Nestled within DIFC—a luxury community and upscale neighborhood—it offers proximity to some of the city's finest art galleries, high-end retailers, and international gourmet restaurants. Nearby, you'll find reputable schools such as Salma Al-Ansariah School, Citizens School, and Jumeira Baccalaureate School, alongside various healthcare facilities including Anatomy Physical Medicine And Rehabilitation Center and MAG Clinic. Religious sites, including Bay Avenue Mosque and Rashid bin Bakhit Mosque, are also conveniently close.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

title: Large 1BR Layout | Unfurnished | Exclusive
description:
Discover upscale urban living in this spacious 1 bedroom apartment in Building 9, City Walk. Spanning an impressive 1,336 sq.ft, this unfurnished unit offers a rare combination of generous space, modern design, and a peaceful community setting ideal for both end users and investors.

The apartment features a bright and airy open plan living and dining area, enhanced by floor to ceiling windows that invite plenty of natural light. The layout flows seamlessly onto a large private balcony, perfect for relaxing or entertaining while enjoying tranquil views of the beautifully landscaped amenities and community spaces.

The bedroom is well sized with built in wardrobes, while the kitchen is designed with functionality in mind, ready to be customized to your personal taste. The overall layout provides flexibility to create a stylish home tailored to your lifestyle.

Located in the heart of City Walk, one of Dubai’s most vibrant and sought after destinations, residents enjoy premium facilities including swimming pools, fitness centers, landscaped areas, and 24/7 security. With world-class retail, dining, and entertainment options just steps away, this property offers the perfect balance between lively city life and serene living.

Limestone House is strategically located in the heart of the Dubai International Financial Center. Direct access to the DIFC gate avenue affords residents the convenience and connectivity to enjoy all that DIFC has to offer. The building is popular with the working professionals in the area, who are within walking distance of their offices. The building also benefits from direct access to the Ritz Carlton hotel, which includes several restaurants and coffee shops. Residents also benefit from a discount scheme for the hotel. Limestone House excludes grandeur and privacy, where, as a resident you will experience direct access to your property from a single use lift.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

Al Habtour City is a development located on Sheikh Zayed Road and the Waterfront. It features three luxury residential towers (Al Meera, Noora and Amna) and three luxury five-star hotels (The St. Regis, The W and The Westin) operated by Starwood Hotels & Resorts. Noura is one of three towers comprising 'The Residence Collection' with very high-class apartments overlooking the canal, horse stables and sea.

Location and Connectivity:

Burj Crown by Emaar sits on Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard, placing residents at the very centre of Downtown Dubai. The Dubai Mall, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Fountain, Souk Al Bahar, and Dubai Opera are all within easy reach, offering world-class dining, retail, entertainment, and cultural experiences on the doorstep. The vibrant boulevard itself is lined with boutique stores, cafes, and restaurants ideal for everyday leisure.

Connectivity is seamless, with direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road and Financial Centre Road linking residents to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is close by, and the pedestrian-friendly boulevard makes walking a genuine daily pleasure.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact James Antony Federer.

raw_area: Island Park II, Dubai Creek Harbour (The Lagoons), Dubai
description:
Sold Out Real Estate proudly introduces an exceptional opportunity to own a brand-new 3-bedroom apartment in the luxurious Island Park II , a prestigious development located in the heart of the iconic Dubai Creek Harbour.
 
This thoughtfully designed apartment is now move in ready, featuring airy interiors, modern finishes, and a peaceful setting framed by lush parks and waterfront views. With the city’s top lifestyle attractions just moments away, you’re perfectly placed to live, unwind, and thrive.

Property Highlights:
- 3 Spacious Bedrooms
- 3 Modern Bathrooms + Powder Room
- Expansive layout with open-plan living
- Dedicated covered parking
- Built-in wardrobes and ample storage
- High quality finishes
- Floor to ceiling windows for unobstructed views of the city and Dubai Creek

Exclusive Community Amenities:
- State of the art fully equipped gym and health club
- Landscaped gardens, jogging tracks, and bicycle paths
- Retail outlets, cafes, and fine dining
- Barbecue areas and social spaces for gatherings
- 24/7 security and concierge services
- Private and peaceful environment while being close to urban hubs

Location Connectivity:
- 5 mins to Dubai Creek Tower and Creek Marina Yacht Club
- 5 mins to Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary
- 10 mins to Dubai International Airport
- 15 mins to Burj Khalifa & Downtown Dubai
- 25 mins to Dubai Marina
- 40 mins to Al Maktoum International Airport

The Island Park Lifestyle
Island Park offers a unique blend of tranquility and connectivity, perfect for those who desire urban convenience without compromising on peace and privacy. Residents enjoy breathtaking views of the iconic Dubai skyline, lush green parks, and meticulously designed communal spaces.

About Us:
Sold Out Real Estate is committed to providing our clients with an extensive range of services that include sales, rentals, property management, consulting, mortgage brokerage, among others, demonstrating our expertise and authority in the field.

McCone Properties brought to you this amazing 2 Bed apartment in Neva Residence which is standing in most Prime Location of JVC. Its right at the entrance and exit of JVC and very close to the Circle Mall of JVC which makes this building more special.

Location and Connectivity:
Neva Residences is a brand-new 17-storey development by Tiger Properties, set within the family-friendly community of Jumeirah Village Circle. The building sits within a neighbourhood renowned for its over 30 landscaped parks, jogging and cycling tracks, and a strong community atmosphere. Circle Mall, which features Spinneys, dining outlets, and retail shops, serves as the community's main lifestyle hub.

JVC is strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, offering excellent connectivity across Dubai. Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Marina, and Mall of the Emirates are all within a short drive, while Downtown Dubai is approximately 20 minutes away.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Noor E Rabbi Al Mostafa.

title: Exclusive | Ultra Luxury | Smart Home
description:
Welcome to a residence where innovation meets exceptional design. This truly one-of-a-kind 3-bedroom apartment with an additional private guest suite has been completely reimagined, setting a new benchmark for luxury living in Dubai.

At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Located in the prestigious Tiara Aquamarine tower on Palm Jumeirah, the apartment has undergone a full high-end transformation. Ambient lighting, premium finishes, and carefully curated furnishings create a refined yet welcoming atmosphere. The former maid’s room has been converted into a stylish fourth bedroom with its own en-suite, ideal as a guest suite.

Floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious balcony showcase breathtaking views of Atlantis, Royal Atlantis, the harbour, and the Arabian Gulf.

Fully furnished, vacant, and move-in ready, the home includes two parking spaces.

Contact Leo Blomquist today to arrange your private viewing.

description:
Apartment for sale in Creek Horizon Tower 1, Creek Horizon

Betterhomes is proud to present this 1 Bedroom Apartment located in Creek Horizon Tower 1, Creek Horizon, Dubai Creek Harbour (The Lagoons).

Unit Details:

* Rented 
* Park View
* Kitchen: Open
* Bathrooms: 1
* Built up Area: 752.50 square feet

* Balcony
* Sea/Water view
* Security
* Intercom
* Concierge Service
* Conference room
* Public parking
* Prayer Room
* Shared Gym
* Pets Allowed
* Childrens play area

Dubai Creek is the cornerstone of Dubai’s heritage. Located next to Ras Al Khor wildlife sanctuary, a home to an abundance of native flora and fauna.

Creek Horizon Tower 1 sits at the heart of Creek Island, centrally positioned adjacent to the community's Central Park and overlooking the district's marina. Dubai Creek Harbour is a master-planned waterfront community by Emaar, offering a 6km harbour promenade lined with cafs, art installations, and dining venues, alongside the Dubai Creek Marina. The Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary, famous for its flamingos and tranquil lagoons, is just moments away, offering a rare natural escape within the city.

The community connects seamlessly to the wider city via Ras Al Khor Road (E44), placing Downtown Dubai and Business Bay approximately 15 minutes away. Dubai International Airport is also easily accessible, and a planned Dubai Metro expansion will further enhance public transport links.

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. JLT offers a range of benefits to residents such as a wide range of restaurants, transport links and directly off Sheikh Zayed Road. Also a high-rise building in Jumeirah Lake Towers, a mixed-use development best known for its beautiful man-made lakes and manicured gardens. The residential building is a part of the Armada Towers complex and is located in Cluster P, JLT.

Tower 3 developed by Armada Group has 36 floors above ground and three floors below ground along with retail options on the ground level. The residential building stands 493 sq. ft. tall. The high-rise is designed by Adnan Saffarini. Its construction started in 2005 and was completed in 2009.

title: ULTRA LUXURY 1 BEDROOM | SEA VIEWS | 50/50 PP
raw_area: Lia by Avenew, Dubai Islands, Dubai
description:
Discover refined waterfront living with this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in LIA by Avenew, located in the heart of Dubai Islands, where the serenity of the Arabian Gulf meets the vibrancy of a contemporary marina. Designed with balance, light, and functionality in mind, this residence reflects a modern coastal lifestyle shaped by nature and architectural precision.

The apartment offers a total area of 831 sq. ft. with a well-proportioned layout featuring an open-plan living and dining area seamlessly connected to a modern kitchen. The bedroom is complemented by a walk-in closet and an en-suite master bathroom, while a separate powder room and dedicated laundry space enhance everyday convenience. Floor-to-ceiling windows allow natural light to flow throughout, opening onto a private balcony ideal for relaxation.

LIA is a boutique G+8 residential building comprising only 81 exclusive residences, crafted with flowing architectural lines, tiered balconies, and lush greenery. Residents enjoy world-class amenities including a podium-level infinity pool, pool bar, fully equipped gym, lounge deck, BBQ areas, kids’ play zone, and a grand triple-height lobby designed as a serene arrival experience.

Strategically positioned, Dubai Islands offers a unique balance of tranquility and accessibility, with easy connections to Downtown Dubai, Dubai International Airport, retail, dining, and leisure destinations.

title: High ROI | Rented | Furnished 2BR | Growth Area
description:
Fully furnished and currently rented, this 2-bedroom apartment in Tenora presents an excellent investment opportunity with immediate rental income and strong long-term appreciation potential within one of Dubai’s fastest-growing master communities.

Located in the heart of Dubai South, the property benefits from ongoing infrastructure development and increasing demand driven by the expansion of Al Maktoum International Airport, Expo City Dubai, and the wider commercial and logistics hub surrounding the area. As the community continues to mature, Dubai South is expected to see significant capital growth, making this an ideal addition to any investment portfolio.
The apartment offers a practical open-plan layout with bright living spaces, modern finishes, floor-to-ceiling windows, and a fitted kitchen. The unit is fully furnished and well suited to both end users and long-term tenants.

title: Prime Location | Investment | Modern Tower
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations. 

Property Features:
- Low Floor
- 800.73 Sq. Ft. 
- Ready to Move In
- Community View
- Fully Furnished and Equipped
- Swimming Pool & Gym
- Allotted Basement Parking Space
- Close to Restaurants, Shops, Mall
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.

Belgravia Square is an Ellington Properties development nestled within Jumeirah Village Circle, one of Dubai's most sought-after family-friendly communities. Developed by Nakheel, JVC is home to over 30 landscaped parks, jogging and cycling tracks, sports courts, and a vibrant selection of cafes, restaurants, and supermarkets. Circle Mall, the community's main retail hub, places everyday conveniences within easy reach.

Strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, JVC offers seamless connectivity to Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Media City, and Dubai Internet City. The building's location in District 14 places residents close to several reputable schools and healthcare facilities, making it an ideal home for professionals and families alike.

description:
Where London prestige meets Dubai’s waterfront brilliance — welcome to Chelsea Residences by DAMAC, an exclusive collection of branded homes inspired by the legacy of Chelsea F.C. and the elegance of coastal living.

This expansive 2-bedroom residence, covering 1,610 sqft, offers a masterfully crafted layout with refined interiors, sweeping sea views, and a seamless flow between indoor comfort and outdoor serenity. Designed for those who demand excellence, every corner of this home reflects premium craftsmanship, curated aesthetics, and a branded lifestyle unlike any other in the city.

Key Features:
• Grand 2-bedroom layout with premium fittings and finishes
• Open-plan living and dining spaces with floor-to-ceiling windows
• Designer kitchen, spa-style bathrooms, and generous storage
• Starting from AED 4,575,000

Signature Wellness & Lifestyle Amenities:
• Rooftop Stamford Pitch & Football Simulation Room
• Coral swing, Aqua gym, and Chelsea Lion Beach
• Rain therapy, halotherapy, cryotherapy, and starlit wellness spaces
• Infinity pool, forest-inspired pods, and jogging track
• Exclusive dining, wellness concierge, and power lounge

Location Advantages:
• Located in Dubai Maritime City, just 15 mins from Downtown Dubai
• Waterfront living between Burj Khalifa and Jumeirah Beach
• Close to Mina Rashid and future cruise terminals
• Excellent connectivity to Sheikh Zayed Road

Flexible Payment Plan:
• 20% upon booking

• 40% on handover (Q4 2029)
• 4% DLD fee + admin charges at booking

Own a statement of style and substance. Contact us today to reserve your place in one of Dubai’s most prestigious waterfront developments — Chelsea Residences by DAMAC.

raw_area: Avita, Passo by Beyond, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
Experience a new dimension of coastal luxury in this exquisitely designed 1-bedroom residence at Passo by Beyond, set on the prestigious Crescent of Palm Jumeirah — one of Dubai’s most iconic and sought-after addresses. This 877 home is a masterclass in refined beachfront living, blending sculptural architecture, timeless interiors, and uninterrupted views of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai’s glittering skyline.

Step into a flowing open-plan layout where high ceilings and expansive glazing fill every corner with natural light, blurring the line between indoors and out. The living and dining area extends seamlessly to a private terrace, offering the perfect setting for morning coffee with sea breezes or evening sunsets over the water. The gourmet kitchen is crafted with sophisticated finishes, integrated appliances, and elegant stone worktops, making it as functional as it is beautiful.

The primary bedroom is a serene retreat, featuring soft textures, bespoke wardrobes, and spa-inspired ensuite bathroom adorned with refined stone finishes and warm neutral tones. A separate powder room, laundry space, and intuitive storage solutions complete the thoughtful design, ensuring both elegance and practicality.

Residents of Passo enjoy private beach access, a 40m-wide white sand shoreline, resort-style pools, wellness pavilions, landscaped social decks, and curated spaces for leisure, work, and connection — all managed with the privacy and exclusivity of a high-end residential community.

Just minutes from Atlantis The Royal, Nakheel Mall, and Dubai Marina, and within easy reach of Downtown Dubai and both airports, Passo offers an unmatched location that balances island tranquility with city convenience.

Price: AED 4,146,000 | Size: 877
Your chance to own an address that needs no introduction — an exclusive residence where every day feels like a five-star escape.

raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Soulever by Beyond rises as Dubai Maritime City’s newest architectural landmark—two sculptural towers shaped by the sea, designed with precision, and infused with tranquility. Developed by Beyond Developments under the Omniyat Group, Soulever reflects Dubai’s maritime heritage through fluid forms, warm natural textures, and panoramic views of the Forest, the Cove, and the vibrant city skyline.

This 1-bedroom residence spans 855  offering a refined and efficient layout that blends living, dining, and balcony spaces with effortless flow. Floor-to-ceiling windows draw in natural light, opening your home to serene Forest and Cove views. Thoughtfully crafted interiors, a stylish powder room, and elevated ceiling heights create a sense of openness and calm—perfect for modern urban living.

Residents enjoy a suite of world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool overlooking the sea, a cutting-edge fitness center, yoga and wellness studios, spa facilities, a private library, residents lounge, event and co-working spaces, a dedicated kids’ area, and a lush landscaped podium with cafés and boutique retail.

Just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the ideal blend of waterfront serenity and city convenience—an exceptional lifestyle destination and a prime investment opportunity.

Price: AED 2,800,000
Size: 855 
View: Forest / Cove
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 1-bedroom residence or exploring other units in Soulever? Reach out today for exclusive availability and investment insights in Dubai Maritime City.

Experience sophisticated city living in this fully upgraded and fully furnished apartment in Burj Daman, DIFC, featuring premium-quality furniture throughout. Overlooking the vibrant DIFC skyline, this elegant residence boasts high-end finishes and floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the space with natural light. The building offers premium lifestyle facilities, including a private dog park, an existing squash court, and planned amenities such as a sauna/steam room and paddle court.

Ideally located just steps from Gate Village and Gate Avenue, this home offers access to DIFC’s finest dining, art, and lifestyle destinations, including Zuma, Roberto’s, Coya, La Petite Maison, Luna Sky Bar, and Vibes. A rare blend of style, location, and convenience, this residence is perfect as a high-end urban sanctuary or investment in Dubai’s premier financial and cultural hub.

Pulse Real Estate is a DIFC area specialist, managing majority of properties in the district and accounting for over AED 1 Billion in sales transactions in DIFC alone. raw_area: Soulever by Beyond Tower 1, Soulever by Beyond, Maritime City, Dubai
description:
Where coastal calm meets urban pulse.
Soulever by Beyond is Dubai Maritime City’s new architectural icon – two sculptural towers rising above the sea, blending natural serenity with refined design. Developed by Beyond Developments under Omniyat Group, Soulever captures Dubai’s maritime legacy through elegant architecture and breathtaking panoramas of the Cove, the Forest, and the city skyline.

This 2-bedroom residence spans 1,469 and offers a graceful layout connecting living, dining, and balcony spaces in harmony. Expansive windows flood the interiors with daylight and soothing marina views. The home features a powder room, refined finishes, and generous ceiling heights that create an airy sense of calm – perfect for both leisure and family life.

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including a heated infinity pool, state-of-the-art gym, yoga and wellness areas, spa, library, residents lounge, event space, kids play area, and a beautifully landscaped podium park with cafés and retail avenues.

Perfectly positioned just 5 minutes from Mina Rashid and 15 minutes from Downtown Dubai, Soulever offers the perfect balance between vibrant city life and tranquil beachfront living.

Price: AED 5,311,000
Size: 1469 sqft 
View: Ocean Cove 
Developer: Beyond Developments (Omniyat Group)

Interested in this 2-bedroom or want to explore other Soulever residences? Get in touch today to discover exclusive investment opportunities in Dubai Maritime City.

description:
Betterhomes is pleased to offer you this stunning One Bedroom apartment located in the Marina Gate Tower 2 by Select Group, Dubai Marina. 

Perfectly positioned at the entrance of Dubai Marina, Marina Gate 2 offers direct access to Marina Walk, and is just minutes from the Metro, Tram, restaurants, cafés, and shops. This is modern waterfront living at its best. 

This one bedroom comes with fitted kitchen appliances, is bright and spacious and it is finished to a very high standard. The apartment has 2 bathrooms, separate laundry area and storage space. There is a balcony from the living room and there are floor to ceiling windows. The apartment is located on a high floor and is overlooking the community. The apartment is vacant and is an ideal option for end users and investors. 

Residents enjoy access to world-class amenities, including two infinity pools, two state-of-the-art gyms, padel and squash courts, basketball/football courts, and the exclusive Amara Lounge. Marina Gate also features the luxurious Jumeirah Living Hotel offering premium services and facilities.

This stunning mixed-use building is one of the most popular residential buildings in DIFC. Each property benefits from having a balcony from which you can enjoy either the serenity of Zabeel, or the epitome of city living, overlooking the DIFC. Burj Daman boasts hotel worthy amenities, with a stunning outdoor swimming pool, squash court and top of the range gymnasium. The complex is connected to the Daman office tower and the superb Waldorf Astoria hotel.

DIFC offers the opportunity to experience city living at its finest. Remarkable apartments appeal to those who are seeking the highest quality of life. DIFC is home to some of Dubai’s finest restaurants and bars, including La Petite Maison, Zuma, Josette and The Guild, along with the prestigious Arts Club to name but a few. Premium office and retail space in DIFC - including the high-profile ICD Brookfield Place - has attracted top tier luxury hotels such as the Four Seasons and Ritz Carlton. DIFC is the paradigm of convenience and connectivity, offering exciting new amenities including the unique Emirates Airline city check-in.

title: Treetop Living | Upgraded | Private
raw_area: Ashjar Building E1, Ashjar, Al Barari, Dubai
description:
Positioned on the first floor within the ever-sought-after Ashjar residences, this exceptional three-bedroom plus maid’s apartment offers a rare sense of privacy, seamlessly immersed within Al Barari’s lush, green canopy.

Spanning a thoughtfully reconfigured layout, the home has undergone a series of considered enhancements to elevate both form and function. The kitchen has been enclosed to create a more defined culinary space, complemented by bespoke built-in cabinetry throughout, delivering both clean aesthetics and practical storage solutions. A fully integrated water filtration system further enhances the everyday living experience.

The heart of the home opens into an expansive living and dining area, framed by floor-to-ceiling glazing that draws in an abundance of natural light while maintaining complete privacy from surrounding greenery. Soft, neutral tones and refined finishes create a calm, understated luxury that flows consistently throughout.

Each of the three bedrooms is generously proportioned, with the primary suite offering a tranquil retreat overlooking the treetops. The additional maid’s room is discreetly positioned, ideal for both live-in support or flexible use.

A defining feature of this residence is the large wrap-around terrace - a true extension of the living space. Surrounded by mature landscaping, it offers multiple zones for lounging and entertaining, capturing the essence of indoor-outdoor living that Al Barari is renowned for.

Set within one of Dubai’s most exclusive, end-user driven communities, residents benefit from unparalleled greenery, privacy, and a lifestyle centred around wellness and nature.

For more information or to arrange a viewing please call Ryan Almond our resident Al Barari expert at Maria Morris Global, or alternatively visit us in our office located in the retail avenue of Seventh Heaven

description:
Turnkey Coastal Serenity with Sunset Views!    
      
Luxury Residences—Dubai’s leading resale and rental agency for Atlantis The Royal Residences and part of the original development sales team—presents this exceptional turnkey home within the new icon of Dubai.   
      
Perfectly positioned to capture golden sunsets, this private residence boasts uninterrupted views across the Arabian Gulf and exquisitely landscaped gardens. Every element has been thoughtfully curated and meticulously enhanced by its current owner to elevate comfort, sophistication, and modern functionality. 
 
Residents of Atlantis The Royal enjoy exclusive Black Tier membership privileges such as 30% discount level to the resort restaurants and spa treatments, and effortless access to world-class amenities, including Michelin-starred dining by global icons, private beach, indoor and outdoor pools, spa and wellness garden, sauna and steam rooms, tennis court, elegant library, resident lounges, business suites, BBQ area with outdoor kitchen, and a state-of-the-art Technogym fitness centre.

The experience is complemented by valet parking, 24-hour concierge services, and a level of discretion and attention to detail found only in the world’s finest 5* branded residences.

Arrange your private viewing today and experience the very definition of coastal elegance and refined living at Atlantis The Royal Residences.

title: THE DORCHESTER COLLECTION | 30/70 PAYMENT PLAN
raw_area: Vela Viento By Omniyat, Business Bay, Dubai
description:
Step into a new dimension of waterfront luxury with this exceptional 2-bedroom + study residence at VELA Viento, Dorchester Collection, located in the heart of Marasi Bay. Developed by OMNIYAT and managed by the world-renowned Dorchester Collection, this project redefines elevated living through design, service, and exclusivity .

Spanning an impressive 3,920 sqft, this residence is designed to maximize space, light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The layout features a spacious open-plan living and dining area, complemented by a show kitchen and a separate back-of-house kitchen.

The residence offers two generously sized bedrooms, including a luxurious master suite with a walk-in dressing area and an elegant en-suite bathroom. A dedicated study adds flexibility for a home office or additional private space, while a maid’s room, laundry area, powder room, and private lift lobby enhance both comfort and privacy.

One of the defining features of this home is its expansive wraparound terraces, extending the living space outdoors and offering breathtaking views of the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Canal . These terraces create a perfect setting for entertaining, relaxation, and enjoying Dubai’s skyline in complete privacy.

VELA Viento is designed by Foster + Partners with interiors by Gilles & Boissier, blending architectural excellence with refined Parisian elegance. Residents enjoy a curated lifestyle with world-class amenities and Dorchester Collection’s legendary services, including concierge, valet, and bespoke hospitality offerings .

Located within Marasi Bay, the project connects seamlessly to Downtown Dubai, DIFC, and Dubai Canal, placing residents at the center of a vibrant waterfront destination.

Price: AED 24,700,000
Size: 3,920 sqft
Handover: Q4 2027
Payment Plan: 30/70
Fully Furnished

Interested in this unit or want to learn more? Get in touch today to explore investment opportunities in VELA Viento – Dorchester Collection, Marasi Bay.
